channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: One dead and two missing in separate Canadian water incidents over the weekend
item.description: A weekend of recreational water activity in Canada has resulted in tragedy in Ontario and an ongoing search operation in British Columbia, highlighting persistent water safety risks during the summer ...

item.title: SB19, Ben&Ben, and Flow G to headline OPM Con 2026 music event
item.description: SB19, Ben&Ben, and Flow G have been announced as the main acts for OPM Con 2026, one of the anticipated gatherings celebrating Original Pilipino Music (OPM). According to the report published by ABS-C...

item.title: Analysis of One Nation’s polling surge and media narratives around Labor’s budget changes
item.description: The article examines a recent surge in support for One Nation, which has reportedly overtaken Labor in primary vote polling according to an AFR/Redbridge/Accent survey. The polling suggests One Nation...

item.title: PM Modi highlights emerging Indian sprinters and social initiatives in Mann Ki Baat
item.description: In the latest episode of Mann Ki Baat, Prime Minister Narendra Modi appreciated the achievements of India’s emerging sprint athletes Gurindervir Singh and Animesh Kujur, who recently set new national ...

item.title: Study finds melanoma metastasis peaks in middle age due to immune system changes
item.description: Recent research from scientists studying melanoma suggests that cancer does not spread in a simple, linear way with aging. Instead, tumor progression appears to vary significantly depending on life st...

item.title: Kapseret MP Oscar Sudi Donates Toyota Prado to Bishop Stephen Gathuo in Uasin Gishu
item.description: Kapseret MP Oscar Sudi has made headlines in Uasin Gishu County after gifting a brand new brown Toyota Prado to Archbishop Paul Stephen Gathuo of Israel Assemblies of God, Kondoo Local Church in Burnt...

item.title: Nigerian Navy commissions new housing and golf club projects, pledges to complete abandoned infrastructure
item.description: The Chief of the Naval Staff, Idi Abbas, don show say the Nigerian Navy dey committed to improving welfare for personnel and finishing abandoned infrastructure across the Service. During Nigerian Navy...

item.title: Douglas Stuart’s 'John of John' explores tenderness and violence in working-class masculinity
item.description: Douglas Stuart’s latest novel, 'John of John', returns to the familiar terrain of his Booker Prize-winning work, exploring the tensions between violence, love, and emotional repression within a workin...

item.title: Compilation of Happy New Month Messages, Wishes, and Prayers for June 2026
item.description: The article presents a large collection of 100 Happy New Month messages, wishes, and prayers prepared to welcome June 2026. It is basically a list-style compilation meant to help people send greetings...

item.title: Kenya's Manufacturing Sector Faces Rising Costs, Import Competition, and Slower Demand
item.description: Kenya's manufacturing sector is currently under significant pressure due to rising production costs, increased competition from imports, and slowing domestic demand. The sector’s contribution to GDP f...

item.title: Voter guide to California statewide executive offices in the 2026 election
item.description: The article provides a comprehensive overview of California’s statewide executive offices that voters will decide in the 2026 election, beyond the high-profile governor’s race. It explains that while ...

item.title: Pro Medicus Gains Momentum Amid Strong Contract Wins and AI Resilience
item.description: Pro Medicus, a medical imaging software company, has reassured investors that artificial intelligence (AI) will not negatively impact its subscription-based business model, easing fears of a so-called...

item.title: Study shows time needed for South Africans to afford official Bafana Bafana jersey
item.description: A new affordability analysis has revealed that South Africans need roughly 1.3 days of work to afford an official Bafana Bafana World Cup jersey, which retails at about R1,599. The findings form part ...

item.title: FIDA urges parents to involve children in family decision-making processes
item.description: The Rivers State branch of the International Federation of Women Lawyers (FIDA) has called on parents and guardians to actively involve children in decision-making within the family, stressing that su...

item.title: Laos Cave Survivors Escape After 11 Days Trapped, Rescue Efforts Continue for Missing Men
item.description: In Laos’ Xaisomboun province, five men trapped in a cave for 11 days after heavy rains flooded the tunnels managed to escape on their own, crawling through nearly 850 feet of narrow, waterlogged passa...

item.title: US Congress considers expanded US–Israel defence technology cooperation under NDAA proposal
item.description: A new provision included in the US House of Representatives’ version of the National Defence Authorisation Act (NDAA) for fiscal year 2027 is being discussed for significantly expanding military and t...

item.title: Canada establishes independent board to review Afghan veterans for the Victoria Cross
item.description: Canada has announced the creation of an Independent Military Honours Review Board to examine cases of Afghan War veterans for potential awards of the Canadian Victoria Cross. The move follows decades ...

item.title: Governor Otti, Orji Kalu, others mourn death of AIG Kanayo Uzuegbu
item.description: The Assistant Inspector-General of Police in charge of Zone 9, Kanayo Uzuegbu, has passed away following cancer-related complications. His death was confirmed after Abia State Governor Alex Otti annou...

item.title: Rod Stewart postpones two Las Vegas shows to recover from sinus infection
item.description: Sir Rod Stewart, the 81-year-old British rock legend, was compelled to cancel two of his Las Vegas residency shows at The Colosseum at Caesars Palace, originally scheduled for last Friday and Saturday...

item.title: US judge reviews controversial settlement in Donald Trump’s US$10 billion IRS lawsuit
item.description: A US federal judge has reopened scrutiny of a controversial settlement involving Donald Trump’s US$10 billion lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service (IRS), raising questions about potential conf...
